en: You want a reason? Thank you.
Okay, so tonight, you're working. Are you listening, or did I lose you? Ben, is she listening?
I am totally listening. I ordered some stuff to check on how it arrived.
ko: 어떻게 도착했는지 확인하려고 몇 가지 주문했어.

en: Not great, by the way. Go on. Tonight? Yeah, okay.
You're working, so Paige and I are gonna go to my mom's for dinner.
After school's Ruby's birthday party. And, uh, what about next Monday?
Do you know yet if we can go to dinner with Robbie and Annie? Oh, I'm so slammed next week.
ko: 로비와 애니와 저녁 먹을 수 있는지 아직 알아?

en: I... I'm sorry. If you wanna go, I'll make it.
ko: 아, 다음 주는 너무 바빠. 미안해. 가고 싶으면 내가 맞출게. 언제였지?

en: When was it? Oh, my God, Monday.
Okay, I'm sorry. I was fixated on this tissue paper. I will be there.
Okay. Thank you for the coffee. Thanks for letting me play.
Oops! Sorry. I'll meet you in the car. Actually, I have to go. Come on, sweetie.
Remember we're gonna drop Paige at school, okay? Here we go. Let's do it.
ko: 기억해, 페이지를 학교에 데려다 줄 거야, 알겠지?

en: Kiss Daddy goodbye. Hey, wait. You forgot your doggie.
